use_cases: Displaying battery charge level in mobile apps or device dashboards
Showing charging status with animated lightning bolt indicator
Indicating low battery warnings with color-coded visual alerts
Power status monitoring in system utilities and IoT dashboards
Device health visualization in control panels and status monitors
ai_summary: A customizable SVG battery indicator component with multiple visual themes (default, minimal, neon, glass) and dynamic color schemes that automatically adjust based on battery level. Features built-in animations for charging states and low battery warnings, supporting percentage display and lightning bolt icons. Optimized as a reusable atomic component for cross-platform use in dashboards, mobile apps, and system monitoring interfaces.
